2026-04-01PMONunavut ActReappointment of the Commissioner of NunavutReappointment of the Honourable Eva Qamaniq Aariak, C.M., O.Nu., of Iqaluit, Nunavut, as Commissioner of Nunavut for a term ending on April 30, 2026, effective April 1, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of the Commissioner of Nunavut
precis: Reappointment of the Honourable Eva Qamaniq Aariak, C.M., O.Nu., of Iqaluit, Nunavut, as Commissioner of Nunavut for a term ending on April 30, 2026, effective April 1, 2026.
